topic.title: Astro
audience: developers evaluating, learning, or implementing the project

sourcePolicy.official: fact baseline; verify claims against this source
sourcePolicy.community: pain and troubleshooting validation; verify before publishing
sourcePolicy.competitor: intent extraction only; do not reuse original wording, structure, or unique expression

publicCitationPolicy.body: natural prose, not paragraph-by-paragraph academic footnotes

bilingual.invariant: English and Chinese pages share factual baseline and differ only for local search questions, resources, and wording.

rules: Use stable URLs, titles, descriptions, headings, sitemap, canonical, and hreflang.
Keep visible answers, sources, limitations, and next steps easy to extract.
Do not create hidden text, AI-only pages, or llms.txt-style promises as the primary optimization.

searchIntentMatrix.label: Background and origin
searchIntentMatrix.userQuestion: Why does this project exist, and what problem was it created to solve?

searchIntentMatrix.label: Evaluation
searchIntentMatrix.userQuestion: When should a developer choose this project instead of an alternative?

searchIntentMatrix.label: First useful workflow
searchIntentMatrix.userQuestion: How does a developer get from zero to a useful result?

searchIntentMatrix.userQuestion: Which concepts must a developer understand before using it well?

searchIntentMatrix.userQuestion: Which practical tasks do users repeatedly search for?

contentGates.name: topic-admission
contentGates.description: The topic has a real problem, stable sources, search demand, alternatives, and a clear audience.

contentGates.name: dossier-admission
contentGates.description: Official sources, multilingual SERP observations, alternatives, and cross-checked facts are recorded.

contentGates.name: outline-admission
contentGates.description: Every page answers a real user question or task and avoids thin keyword-only pages.

contentGates.name: publish-admission
contentGates.description: Every page has metadata, a core answer, limitations, next steps, and public sources.

contentGates.name: optimization-admission
contentGates.description: Post-publish work follows Search Console, analytics, SERP changes, and user questions.
